title: jasione humilis var. lanuginella
intro: Jasione humilis var. lanuginella, also known as woolly bellflower, is a perennial plant species within the bellflower family. It is native to mountainous regions and has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Jasione humilis var. lanuginella typically involve infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
